description: SimplyRETS provides normalized real-estate listing data from MLS feeds so developers can build IDX websites and applications. It connects to RETS or RESO Web API feeds from MLS/data providers and exposes them through a standard API.
summary: SimplyRETS exposes one authenticated REST API at https://api.simplyrets.com/ with published OpenAPI/Swagger documents; no public GraphQL API, MCP server, or first-party CLI was found.
